text.title: Image Generation Basics Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure for an image-generation pipeline.

step.name: pick-provider
step.action: Match to provider: tight brand low-volume → DALL-E 3; high-volume social → Flux-schnell; cost-only with editable seed → SDXL.

step.name: build-prompts
step.action: Assemble (subject + style + lighting + composition + technical) per prompt. Reject free-text concatenation.

step.name: smoke-3
step.action: Generate 3 images. Inspect manually for prompt-policy refusals, drift in revised_prompt, brand mismatch.
step.decision-gate: If >0 refusals or drift unacceptable → revise prompts, repeat smoke.

step.name: batch-with-rl
step.input: full prompt list + provider RL budget
step.action: Run batch with exponential backoff on 429. Track org-level concurrent calls; respect per-org cap.

step.name: download
step.action: Download bytes within the call; PUT to durable storage_uri prefix. Store storage_uri + revised_prompt in the audit log.
step.decision-gate: If download fails → retry with backoff; never cache the URL.

step.name: log-audit
step.action: Append (ts, provider, input_prompt, revised_prompt, storage_uri, cost_usd) to the audit sink.
